'''Donald Austen''' is an English puppeteer who worked on [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]

==Biography==
During [[1999]], Austen was hand-picked by master puppeteer [[Frank Oz]] to help him portray [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. For this complex puppet, Oz would need three helpers, including Austen, [[David Greenaway]] and [[Kathy Smee]].

{{Bio-stub}}
